'''Trossilik''' was a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] who placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on [[Gahseelik]] for disgracefully leaving the clan on Trandosha to work for [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] would then collect this bounty.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{Mo}}

==Sources==
*[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Bounty Hunter'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]
